prompt: A modern SaaS login screen mockup. Centered card on a clean off-white background with subtle gradient. Card contains: the exact title "Welcome back" in large bold sans-serif at the top, a subtitle "Sign in to your workspace" in smaller gray text. Below: an "Email" input field, a "Password" input field with eye icon, a "Forgot password?" link in soft blue, and a primary "Sign in" button in deep navy with white text. Below the card: "Dont have an account? Sign up" link. Realistic UI design, system font, sharp pixel-perfect rendering, 8px corner radius.
